data.raceName: BECOME A BRC MEMBER QTIS 2YO HANDICAP
data.raceComments: {"comment":"Doomben will host the Metro meeting in Queensland, and the first of 8 races is a juvenile sprint over 1110m for 85K. 2. EVER SO READY was put aside after an easy Gold Coast win, and he resumed without a trial to finish third at Eagle Farm 3 weeks ago. He will be spot on for this, and is the one to beat for us. 1. UNLOADING caused an upset when winning on debut in the same race as the top pick by a nose. He has to carry an extra 1.5kg here, but he will be even sharper for the experience. Go again. 8. ELUSIVE CAPITAL ran on late behind the top 2 picks in the same race, and she will relish the extra 110m here. A 3kg claim means she will carry 2kg less than last time, and she can figure in the top 3. 7. MAGRITTE was good enough to be stakes placed in her initial prep, and she will only be stronger this year. She looked sharp when placed in a recent trial, and she will be ready to rumble fresh. Check the markets.","runners":[2,1,8,7],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: DOOMBEN-R1-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
